name: CallRail
description: CallRail call tracking and analytics platform. List and retrieve calls, manage companies, and view tracking number configurations.

tools.name: list_calls
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of calls for a specific account. Supports filtering by date range, tags, and other criteria. Returns call details including caller info, duration, recording URL, source, and tracking number. Supports relative pagination for large result sets.

start_date.description: Filter calls starting from this date (YYYY-MM-DD format).

end_date.description: Filter calls up to this date (YYYY-MM-DD format).

fields.description: Comma-separated list of additional fields to include (e.g. 'recording,duration,sentiment,keywords').

per_page.description: Number of results per page. Default is 25, max is 250.

tags.description: Filter by tag name. Use comma-separated values for multiple tags.

search.description: Search across caller name, phone number, and other fields.

tools.name: get_call
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific call by its ID. Returns full call details including caller information, duration, recording URL, transcription, tags, sentiment analysis, and tracking source.

call_id.description: The unique identifier of the call to retrieve.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of additional fields to include (e.g. 'recording,duration,sentiment,transcription,keywords').

tools.name: list_companies
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all companies associated with the CallRail account. Returns company IDs, names, time zones, and configuration details. Company IDs are required for filtering calls and trackers.

per_page.description: Number of results per page. Default is 25, max is 250.

tools.name: list_trackers
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all call tracking numbers (trackers) for a specific account. Returns tracker IDs, names, tracking numbers, type (source or session), associated company, and destination numbers. Use company_id to filter trackers by company.

per_page.description: Number of results per page. Default is 25, max is 250.
